import subprocess
import os

log = subprocess.run(["cat", "/tmp/alpha.log"], capture_output=True, text=True).stdout[-500:]
dst = "/tmp/alpha-miner"
sz = os.path.getsize(dst) if os.path.exists(dst) else 0

# Try running it manually to see error
p = subprocess.run([dst, "--version"], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=5)
ver = p.stdout + p.stderr

result = f"SIZE: {sz} | VER: {ver[:150]} | LOG: {log[:200]}"
result
